commit ef1d027be116f25e25bb94a60da491c2cf55bd0b
Author: Mihai Maruseac <mihaimaruseac@google.com>
Date:   Tue Nov 9 11:04:04 2021 -0800

    Prevent copying uninitialized data in `AssignOp`.
    
    This prevents harder to debug undefined behaviors that cannot be traced back to the original tensor after assignments occur earlier in the graph execution. Several of these undefined behaviors are just reference bindings to null pointers, which are caught when running under ubsan/asan.
    
    PiperOrigin-RevId: 408654780
    Change-Id: Iad2ec40d43f5fd7ea016c20283356c12d5ddeab1

 tensorflow/core/kernels/assign_op.h | 6 ++++++
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+)

You can call `viewcode` and `locate_symbol` to further check the results step by step. For newly introduced code, we consider that this hunk `need not ported`.

part.text: The target file has the same `AssignOp::Compute` structure and already binds `rhs` before forwarding the ref, so the security check can be inserted at the same point with no adaptation.
